name: Colombo De Giraumon (Spicy Pumpkin)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb pumpkin (peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
The pumpkin used in this recipe is not the type typically used for Jack O' Lanterns; it is an orange squash commonly referred to as "pumpkin" in West Indian groceries.
First, heat the oil in a heavy pan. Add the onion and sauté until transparent. Then add the garlic and cook until fragrant.
Next, incorporate the curry powder, ground cloves, chopped tomatoes, sultanas, and sugar. Drizzle with lemon juice.
Cover and gently simmer for 30-40 minutes, or until the pumpkin is tender. Stir occasionally to prevent burning. Season with salt and pepper before serving alongside main dishes and rice.
Serves: 4
